81 G1AA G1AA_SELF_BED 23aA(G1aA)Bed Mobility - Self Performance CHAR 1 Indicates how the patient without assitance moves to and from a lying position, turns side to side, and positions body while in bed. -1 = Unknown, 0 = Independent - No help or oversight -OR- Help/oversight provided only 1 or
